content:
# Session 34 (iter-034) — review

## Metadata
- Stage: prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **1.1.2 `H_tensor_invertible` — STEP D→E→F + close.**
- **Sorry: 3 → 2.** `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2) **CLOSED**. Live: `H_tensor` L1893 (1.1.3), `ext_finite_flat` L1928 (1.10).
- **Axioms: 22 → 22 `External.*`** (NET UNCHANGED — zero net-new). `#print axioms H_tensor_invertible` = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound, External.H_existence, External.sheafifyTensorComparison, External.sheafifyTensorComparisonLeft}` — only pre-existing sanctioned anchors, no `sorryAx`. All 8 new decls `lean_verify` axiom-clean.
- Build exit 0 (8475 jobs, 81s), 2 remaining sorries.
- **HEADLINE: the entire monoidal strand opened @031 reaches its terminus — `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2) is the 4th §1 deep theorem closed** (after 1.4@017, 1.2@022, 1.3@030). The plan's STEP-D first-factor-naturality mirror landed mechanically as predicted; reversal tripwire did NOT fire.

## Solved — `H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2, L1878), 8 supporting decls (lines ~1655–1878)
Full STEP D-i → D-ii → D-iii → E → F handoff in one iter:
- **`tensorRightMapIso`** (~1655) — `e : L₁≅L₂ ↦ tensorRight L₁ ≅ tensorRight L₂`, component `(tensorLeft A).mapIso e`; naturality = tensor interchange, closed by `ext1 Z; simp only [tensorHom_app, comp_app, id_app]; exact (MonoidalCategory.whisker_exchange _ _).symm`. (Dead end: `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` does not fire on `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom`.)
- **`tensorLeftUnitorNatIso`** (~1690) — `tensorLeft 𝒪_X ≅ 𝟭`, component `tensorLeftUnitor A`; naturality = presheaf `leftUnitor_naturality (C := PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf ⋙ forget₂ …))` + sheafification-counit naturality. **The linchpin obstacle of the iter:** the sheafification-square reassociation could not be done by `rw [Category.assoc]` / `rw [step]` / `rw [reassoc_of% step]` / `slice_lhs` / `simp only [← Category.assoc]` — ALL silently fail to match `≫` (the `≫` carries a non-syntactic `CategoryStruct`/instance path). **Fixed by a pure term-mode `Eq.trans` chain** (`(Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans ((congrArg (· ≫ e) step).trans …)`).
- **`tensorRightUnitorNatIso`** (~1738) — `𝟭 ≅ tensorRight 𝒪_X := (tensorBraidingNatIso 𝒪_X ≪≫ tensorLeftUnitorNatIso).symm`. One-liner reusing the already-natural braiding.
- **`assocIdxL₁` / `assocIdxR₁`** (private) + **`tensorAssocNatIso₁`** (~1771) — first-factor mirror of `tensorAssocNatIso₂/₃` (3-NatIso decomposition). `assocIdxR₁`'s fixed second slot **must** be `tensorHom (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')` (NOT `𝟙 (tensorObj L L')`) so `associator_naturality φ (𝟙 L)(𝟙 L')` matches definitionally — the plain `map_comp.symm.trans (congr_map …) map_comp` chain then works with no id-bridge. (Dead end: `𝟙 (tensorObj …)` forces a non-defeq `id_tensorHom_id` bridge that `rw [← presheaf_id_tensorHom_id]` can't land, implicit-`R` spelling mismatch.)
- **`tensorRightEquivOfInvertible`** (~1851) — `Equivalence.mk (tensorRight L)(tensorRight L')` with `L'/e` from `IsInvertibleMod`; unit/counit are NatIso composites of `tensorRightUnitorNatIso`/`tensorRightMapIso`/`tensorAssocNatIso₁`. NO triangle/coherence (confirmed @032). All NatIsos ⇒ naturality free.
- **`homTensorFunctorTwistIso`** (~1867) — `homTensorFunctor f (I⊗L)(F⊗L) ≅ homTensorFunctor f I F` via `isoWhiskerRight (tensorRearrangeNatIso F L).symm (coyoneda …) ≪≫ isoWhiskerLeft (tensorLeft F) (coyonedaCompFF hFF I)`, whiskered by `Scheme.Modules.pullback f`. `hFF := (tensorRightEquivOfInvertible hL).fullyFaithfulFunctor`. Functor-comp associativity defeq ⇒ no explicit `Functor.associator`.
- **`H_tensor_invertible`** (~1878) — Yoneda reflection: `⟨(coyoneda.preimageIso (r₁ ≪≫ homTensorFunctorTwistIso … ≪≫ r₂.symm)).unop.symm⟩`, `rᵢ := (H_represents …).some`. `coyoneda` Full+Faithful resolve automatically.

## Blocked / untouched (correct)
- `H_tensor` (1.1.3), `ext_finite_flat` (1.10) — off-lane, untouched as instructed. 1.1.3 is now un-gated by the completed naturality layer (next candidate).

## This session's analysis
- 83 events: 20 edits, 5 goal checks, 18 diagnostics (7 clean), 17 searches, 0 standalone builds in REPL + 1 final whole-file `lake build` (exit 0), 8 transient errors — ALL self-corrected (synth failure on bare `PresheafOfModules` → pin `C`/`presheafLeftUnitor`; `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` no-match → `whisker_exchange` via `exact`; rw/simp/reassoc_of% reassociation no-match → term-mode `Eq.trans` chain; `𝟙 (tensorObj)` id-bridge mismatch → `tensorHom (𝟙)(𝟙)` convention; `LSP timeout`/path errors → re-probe with absolute path).
- Exemplary judgment: recognized the rw/simp-won't-match-`≫` family as a defeq-instance-path issue (not a missing lemma) and pivoted to term-mode reassociation rather than lemma-hunting; matched the `assocIdxR₁` fixed-factor convention to the proven `₃` recipe; verified zero net-new axioms before exiting. No sorry-grind.
- `sync_leanok`: iter=34, sha 1d1d6fb, added=6, removed=0 — genuine (6 STEP-D/E/F lemmas marked on sorry-free decls). No laundering; no manual override warranted.
- `dag-query`: gaps=0; **unmatched=2** `lean_aux` (`tensorLeftUnitorNatIso`, `tensorRightMapIso`) → recommendations coverage debt (planner to blueprint). The other 6 STEP-D decls were pre-authored by the @034 planner.
- **Blueprint markers (manual): none.** `sync_leanok` (iter=34) handled `\leanok`; new decls are anchor-built (not Mathlib leaves) ⇒ no `\mathlibok`; no renames flagged in the task result (prover used the planner's pre-authored names). No stale `\notready`.
- **Doctor:** 22 `External.*` re-flagged (intentional EGA/OB/Stacks + monoidal-sheafification boundary). No new axioms. No orphan-chapter / broken-`\ref` findings reported.

## Convergence verdict
**Genuine, planned convergence — lane CLOSED.** The 4-iter monoidal strand (031 STEPs1–3 → 032 A–B+substrate → 033 STEP C linchpin → 034 STEP D–F) terminated exactly as scoped: `H_tensor_invertible` closed, axiom-flat, no new structural anchors added beyond the two re-typed comparison NatIsos. Not receding-horizon: each iter landed forward decls toward the single close, which is now done.
